author: lOrm
content: Not addressed in this bulk: src/tools/bash/policy.rs is in the forbidden module set for this task. Fix path is straightforward (swap command.to_ascii_lowercase() for command.to_lowercase() at the denied_reason call site to close the U+212A / Unicode-case-mapping bypass) but needs to be paired with the related #589 bash-policy work to keep the bash module's owner in the loop.
